title: [codereview] Kconfig federation_mode depends and defaults need refinement
description: The LICHEN_GW_FEDERATION_MODE int with range 0-2 and depends using = may not prompt correctly. Better to use choice or separate bools for modes. Also add to relevant board confs and update help with reference to mugl.3. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Fixed Kconfig to use choice for federation_mode, added proper depends/prompts/refs to spec/mugl.3, updated help. 1/3 codereview pass clean
